system.effect: This all-purpose mechadendrite grants +10 to Tech-Use. It carries six injectors of sacred unguents, can release censer chaff as a Half Action once every fifteen minutes to impose -5 Weapon Skill on living creatures within 2 metres for one round, and counts as a mono-knife in close quarters. Unless the censer is deactivated, it also makes the user easier to detect by smell.
system.drawbacks: Requires the relevant Mechadendrite Use talent and Cyber-Mantle. A character may not have more mechadendrites than his Toughness Bonus.

description.value: A general-purpose Mechanicus utility limb combining tools, injectors, censers, and a mono-edged implement.

system.notes: Requires relevant Mechadendrite Use talent and Cyber-Mantle.
